learn.title: Enhance Your Vocabulary with MemMaster!

learn.benefit-plans: Personalized learning plans tailored to your needs.
learn.benefit-quizzes: Interactive quizzes to test your progress.

learn.benefit-mobile: Mobile-friendly interface for learning on the go.

learn.hint-select-folder: Select a folder to start learning.
learn.hint-all-remembered: All cards already marked as remembered, select another folder.
learn.include-remembered-hint: Include remembered cards in the practice session

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1-content: By accessing and using MemMaster, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.section2-content: MemMaster grants you a limited license to use this application for personal, educational, and non-commercial purposes. You may not reproduce, modify, distribute, or transmit any content without prior written consent from MemMaster.
terms.section2-item1: You may not sell, transfer, or assign your account to any third party
terms.section2-item2: You may not attempt to access unauthorized areas of the application
terms.section2-item3: You may not use the application for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
terms.section2-item4: You must comply with all applicable laws and regulations
terms.section3-content: You are responsible for all content you create and upload to MemMaster. You retain all rights to your content, and you grant MemMaster a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, copy, modify, and distribute your content for providing the service.
terms.section4-content: MemMaster and its contents, features, and functionality (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video, and audio) are owned by MemMaster, its licensors, or other providers of such material and are protected by international copyright laws.
terms.section5-content: In no event shall MemMaster, its directors, employees, or agents be liable to you for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service or its contents.
terms.section6-content: The application is provided on an 'as is' basis without warranties of any kind, either expressed or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
terms.section7-content: MemMaster may terminate your access to the application at any time, for any reason, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the application will immediately cease.
terms.section8-content: MemMaster reserves the right to modify or discontinue the application or any services or features at any time, with or without notice.
terms.section9-content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable in the jurisdiction where MemMaster operates, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.
terms.section10-content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at: memmaster@abcdef.at
terms.contact-info: © 226 MemMaster. All rights reserved. For questions about our Terms of Service, please contact memmaster@abcdef.at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1-content: MemMaster ('we', 'our', or 'us') operates the application. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our application and the choices you have associated with that data.
privacy.section2-content: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our service to you.
privacy.section2-item1: Personal Data: Email address, first name, last name, and user-generated content (flashcards, folders)
privacy.section2-item2: Usage Data: Information about how you use the application, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages
privacy.section2-item3: Cookies: Small files stored on your device to enhance user experience
privacy.section2-item4: Device Information: Device type, operating system, and unique device identifiers
privacy.section2-item5: Communication Data: Messages, feedback, and support requests you send to us
privacy.section3-content: MemMaster uses the collected data for various purposes: to provide and maintain our service, to notify you about changes to our service, to allow you to participate in interactive features, to provide customer support, to gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our service, and to monitor the usage of our service.
privacy.section4-content: The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy.section5-content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date at the top of this Privacy Policy.
privacy.section6-content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email at: memmaster@abcdef.at
privacy.section7-content: You have the right to access, update, or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in the Contact Us section.
privacy.section8-content: We will retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to provide our services and for legitimate business purposes. You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
privacy.section9-content: Our service may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. Please review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.
privacy.contact-info: © 2026 MemMaster. All rights reserved. For questions about our Privacy Policy, please contact memmaster@abcdef.at
